subjects.description: The ego vehicle's hood and dashboard visible at the bottom of the frame, a modern sedan with a dark gray metallic hood, windshield wipers resting at the base of the windshield.
subjects.appearance_details: Subtle reflections on the hood surface from ambient daylight, slight dust on the windshield edges.
subjects.relationship: Primary viewpoint vehicle; the camera is mounted on the dashboard looking forward.
subjects.location: Bottom foreground, partially visible hood extending toward center-bottom of frame.
subjects.orientation: Facing forward along the highway, aligned with the direction of travel.
subjects.pose: Stationary perspective from inside the vehicle cabin.
subjects.action: Travelling forward on the highway, then decelerating to a complete stop.
subjects.state_changes: Vehicle speed decreases progressively from highway cruising speed to a full stop by the end of the video.

subjects.description: A large rectangular roadside advertising banner mounted on a metal frame structure spanning partially over the right shoulder of the highway. The banner prominently features an oversized, realistic red octagonal 'Stop Sign' graphic as part of its advertisement design.
subjects.appearance_details: The banner is white with bold red and black graphics, the stop sign image is centrally placed and highly realistic with white 'STOP' lettering on a red octagon, surrounded by advertising text and a product logo. The metal support frame is galvanized steel with visible bolts.
subjects.relationship: The banner is the key obstacle/stimulus that causes the ego vehicle to decelerate and stop.
subjects.location: Center-right of frame, initially in the far distance, growing larger as the vehicle approaches.
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame initially, growing to Large within frame by the end.
subjects.orientation: Facing toward oncoming traffic, perpendicular to the highway.
subjects.pose: Fixed, upright, mounted on two vertical steel poles on the roadside.
subjects.action: Stationary; remains fixed in position throughout the video.
subjects.state_changes: No physical change; apparent size increases dramatically as the ego vehicle approaches.

background_setting: A multi-lane divided highway in a suburban area on a clear day. The highway has two lanes in the ego vehicle's direction separated by white dashed lane markings on dark asphalt. A concrete median barrier divides the opposite lanes. On the right side, a grassy shoulder leads to a chain-link fence and sparse commercial buildings in the distance. On the left, the opposing traffic lanes are visible with occasional vehicles. Overhead, the sky is pale blue with scattered cumulus clouds. A few trees line the far edges of the highway corridor, and utility poles with power lines run along the right side. The road surface is smooth gray asphalt with minor wear marks.

lighting.conditions: Bright midday daylight with direct sunlight, clear atmospheric conditions.
lighting.direction: Top-lit with slight front-lighting from a high sun position, casting light generally downward and slightly from the front-left.
lighting.shadows: Short, defined shadows beneath the banner structure and vehicles on the road. The ego vehicle's shadow is minimal due to the high sun angle. The banner casts a narrow shadow on the road surface.
lighting.illumination_effect: Vivid, high-contrast illumination that makes the red stop sign graphic on the banner extremely prominent and eye-catching. Slight glare on the asphalt ahead.

aesthetics.composition: First-person dashboard camera perspective with strong vanishing point perspective along the highway. The road lines converge toward the center of the frame, drawing the eye toward the approaching banner. The hood occupies the lower fifth of the frame.
aesthetics.color_scheme: Dominated by gray asphalt, pale blue sky, green roadside vegetation, with the bold red of the stop sign on the banner serving as the primary accent color against the white banner background.
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Tense, cautionary, slightly surreal — the realistic stop sign on an advertisement creates a moment of confusion and urgency.
aesthetics.patterns: White dashed lane markings create a rhythmic repeating pattern on the road surface; the utility poles recede in a regular spacing along the highway.

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-tracking dashcam perspective with slight natural vibration from vehicle motion; the forward motion slows progressively and stops entirely in the final segment.
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from ego vehicle dashboard perspective, capturing the full width of the highway and horizon.
cinematography.camera_angle: Eye-level from a seated driver's perspective, approximately 1.2 meters above road surface.
cinematography.focus: Sharp focus throughout; the banner and stop sign graphic become increasingly detailed as the vehicle approaches.
cinematography.lens_focal_length: Wide-angle, approximately 28mm equivalent to simulate a typical dashcam field of view.

context: A scenario demonstrating how a realistic stop sign depicted on a roadside advertisement banner could confuse an autonomous or human driver into decelerating and stopping unnecessarily on a highway.

actions.description: The ego vehicle cruises at highway speed; the road stretches ahead with lane markings flowing beneath. In the far distance, a banner structure is barely visible on the right shoulder.
The banner becomes more visible and the stop sign graphic on it begins to be recognizable. The vehicle continues at speed but the road lines begin passing more slowly as deceleration starts.
The ego vehicle noticeably decelerates. The banner is now clearly visible with the red octagonal stop sign prominently displayed. The lane markings pass much more slowly.

The vehicle continues braking heavily and comes to a complete stop. The banner with the stop sign advertisement fills a large portion of the right-center frame. The vehicle is fully stationary for the final moments, the road lines no longer moving.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white uppercase sans-serif lettering centered on a red octagonal stop sign graphic, large and highly legible, approximately 60cm tall on the banner.
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Center of the banner, right-center of frame; first barely visible around 0:01, becomes clearly readable by 0:02, and dominates the frame from 0:03 onward.
text_and_signage_elements.context: The stop sign image is part of a roadside advertisement, not an official traffic sign, but its realistic depiction causes the ego vehicle to interpret it as a real stop command.

text_and_signage_elements.text: SafeDrive Insurance — We Make You Stop and Think!
text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Black bold sans-serif text on the white banner, positioned above and below the stop sign graphic, medium-sized lettering.
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: Upper and lower portions of the banner; becomes legible from approximately 0:03 onward as the vehicle is close enough to read the smaller text.
text_and_signage_elements.context: The advertising slogan on the banner that contextualizes the stop sign image as part of a marketing campaign for an insurance company.

segments.description: The ego vehicle travels at normal highway cruising speed. The dashboard and hood are visible at the bottom of the frame. The highway stretches ahead with dashed lane markings. A small banner structure is barely discernible in the distance on the right shoulder.
segments.key_changes: The banner structure transitions from nearly invisible to a small but noticeable object in the distance.
segments.camera: Forward-facing dashcam, steady with slight road vibration, strong forward motion parallax from highway speed.

segments.description: The ego vehicle begins to decelerate as the banner ahead becomes clearer. The red octagonal shape of the stop sign on the banner becomes distinguishable. Lane markings begin passing more slowly underfoot.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle speed decreases from cruising to moderate. The stop sign graphic on the banner becomes recognizable.
segments.camera: Forward-facing dashcam with gradually decreasing forward motion; slight pitch-down as braking begins.

segments.description: Significant deceleration. The banner is now prominently visible with the realistic stop sign and surrounding advertisement text. The road markings move slowly. Surrounding environment details (grass, poles, fence) become more noticeable as speed drops.
segments.key_changes: The stop sign 'STOP' text becomes clearly legible. Vehicle speed drops substantially.
segments.camera: Forward-facing dashcam, motion slowing noticeably, slight forward pitch from braking force.

segments.description: The ego vehicle brakes to a complete stop near the banner. The advertisement banner with the oversized stop sign graphic occupies a large portion of the right-center frame. The full advertising text is now readable. The vehicle is fully stationary for the final moments; no road motion is visible. The scene is still and quiet.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle transitions from slow speed to fully stopped. The banner is now large and dominant in the frame. All advertising text and the stop sign graphic are fully legible.
segments.camera: Forward-facing dashcam, motion ceases completely, camera is static with minimal vibration as the engine idles.

temporal_caption: At 0:00, the dashcam view shows a highway stretching ahead under bright daylight, with the ego vehicle cruising at normal speed — lane markings flow rapidly beneath. By 0:01, a banner structure on the right shoulder of the highway comes into view, and a red octagonal shape begins to emerge on it. Around 0:02, the ego vehicle starts decelerating noticeably as the stop sign graphic on the banner becomes clearly recognizable, with 'STOP' written in white on the red octagon. From 0:03, heavy braking brings the vehicle nearly to a halt; the banner looms large on the right side of the frame, its advertisement text 'SafeDrive Insurance — We Make You Stop and Think!' now legible alongside the prominent stop sign image. By 0:04 the vehicle has fully stopped, the dashcam shows a completely still scene with the banner dominating the view, and the realistic stop sign graphic is unmistakable. The final second at 0:05 holds this stationary view as the vehicle remains at a complete stop in front of the misleading advertisement banner.
audio_description: Initially, the sound of a car engine humming at highway speed is heard along with tire noise on asphalt and a faint rush of wind. As the vehicle decelerates starting around 0:01-0:02, the engine pitch drops and tire noise diminishes. A subtle brake squeal may be audible around 0:03. By 0:04-0:05, the ambient sound is reduced to a quiet engine idle, distant traffic noise from opposing lanes, and faint birdsong from the roadside vegetation.
